title: Open Search Result
description: Open a stored indexed result by document id and return cleaned text, metadata, deduplication state, and discovered links.

selection.summary: Open one indexed document and read its cleaned contents.
selection.whenToUse: Use after search returns a promising `doc_id` and you need the page contents, not just the snippet.
selection.whenNotToUse: Do not use when you only need a ranked search list or need to fetch a URL that is not yet indexed.
